scripts.build: npm run build -w @ca/shared && npm run build -w @ca/providers && npm run build -w @ca/pipelines && npm run build -w @ca/worker && npm run build -w @ca/scheduler && npm run build -w @ca/dashboard
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @ca/shared && npm run typecheck -w @ca/providers && npm run typecheck -w @ca/pipelines && npm run typecheck -w @ca/worker && npm run typecheck -w @ca/scheduler && npm run typecheck -w @ca/dashboard
